case_title: VIEIRA, ROSE-MARIE vs. FEDERAL EXPRESS ( A DELAWARE CORPORATION)

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF VIEIRA, ROSE-MARIE AS TO DEFENDANT FEDERAL EXPRESS ( A DELAWARE CORPORATION)

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VIEIRA, ROSE-MARIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FEDERAL EXPRESS ( A DELAWARE CORPORATION) $8,224.52 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,304.52
